email_subject: Application for Customer Service Representative at Synergie Bornem
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Service Representative position at Synergie Bornem, as advertised. With a strong foundation in customer support, order management, and communication, I am confident I can contribute to your team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client accounts, handle inquiries, and ensure timely delivery of projects. I am experienced in maintaining accurate records, tracking performance, and resolving issues proactively. My background also includes logistics coordination at Katoen Natie, where I developed efficiency and accuracy in a fast-paced environment.

I have excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) and am comfortable with CRM systems and data management. I am eager to apply my organizational skills and customer-centric approach to support your order life cycle and enhance customer satisfaction.

I am available to start immediately and can work onsite as required. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can add value to your team.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO. At Episto, I manage client accounts, handle inquiries, and ensure timely delivery of projects. I am experienced in maintaining accurate records, tracking performance, and resolving issues proactively. My background also includes logistics coordination at Katoen Natie, where I developed efficiency and accuracy in a fast-paced environment. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & account management: client account management, inquiry handling, proactive issue resolution, accurate record-keeping
- Order management: order life cycle understanding, logistics coordination, timely delivery
- Communication: excellent English (written and verbal), cross-functional collaboration
- Tools & systems: CRM systems, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage client accounts, handle inquiries, and ensure timely delivery of projects
- Maintain accurate records of interactions and performance data
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide decisions
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
